title: Dependencies between 3 or more tasks
excerpt:

posts.author: ElectricSweater (Stuart Fleisher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

At the moment, when multiple items are dependent on the same item, the “adjust” automation only affects one of the items. In other words I want adjusting the timeline for Item A to push the start date for items B and C. Instead, it’s only adjusting item B.

The reverse is also true, in that it doesn’t seem possible for item C to depend on the timelines of both items A and B.

Has anyone found a solution or workaround for either of these issues?

This seems like a pretty common need, and not having it kind of negates most of the usefulness of dependencies. Fix this Monday!!
